title: Vanilla Crispy Ukrainian Vilachi Creme
description: A fermented, crunchy, adventurous Ukrainian dish featuring vanilla and a tandoor-inspired twist, high in protein-friendly for an adventurous breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Fermented Flaxseed Paste
ingredients.notes: Made by mixing flaxseeds with water and allowing to ferment for at least 24 hours.

instructions: Mix almond flour, fermented flaxseed paste, and vanilla powder until fully combined.
Add coconut oil gradually while mixing to achieve a spreadable consistency. Be careful not to overwork the mixture as this can make it too dense for your taste preference.
Press the mixture into a lined 8-inch square baking dish or mold for even spreading.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown and crispy on top. Allow to cool completely before serving.
